inputs.label: Planned Production Time (min)
inputs.businessContext: Total time scheduled for production per shift. Based on ISO 22400 OEE standard.

inputs.label: Operating Time (min)
inputs.businessContext: Actual time machine is running. Calculated as planned production time minus downtime losses.

inputs.label: Ideal Cycle Time (min/part)
inputs.businessContext: Theoretical minimum time to produce one part under optimal conditions. From machine specifications.

inputs.label: Total Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total count of parts produced during operating time.

inputs.label: Good Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Parts meeting quality standards. Used to calculate quality rate.

inputs.label: Downtime Loss (min)
inputs.businessContext: Total unplanned downtime including breakdowns, setup, and adjustments.

inputs.label: Speed Loss Factor
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual speed to ideal speed. Calculated as (ideal cycle time * total parts) / operating time.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of defective parts. Calculated as (total - good) / total.

inputs.label: Cost per Part ($)
inputs.businessContext: Standard cost per part including material, labor, and overhead.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output.

suggestedActions: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement Poka-Yoke and SPC to reduce defects.' : ''
availability < 0.9 ? 'Conduct TPM and SMED to reduce downtime.' : ''
performance < 0.9 ? 'Optimize cycle time and reduce speed losses.' : ''
